# SplashRide

> SplashRide is a developer learning platform that helps developers learn technologies, prepare for interviews, understand production issues, and follow career-focused learning paths.

## Core Pages

* [Home](https://www.splashride.in/)
* [Technologies](https://www.splashride.in/technologies)
* [Interview Prep](https://www.splashride.in/interview-prep)
* [Career Paths](https://www.splashride.in/career-paths)
* [About](https://www.splashride.in/about)

## Technology Hubs

* [AEM](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/aem)
* [Contentful](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/contentful)
* [Sitecore](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/sitecore)
* [HTML & CSS](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/html-css)
* [JavaScript](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/javascript)
* [Python](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/python)
* [React](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/react)
* [Next.js](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/nextjs)
* [Core Java](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/java)
* [Spring Boot](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/springboot)
* [AWS](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/aws)
* [Docker](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/docker)
* [Kubernetes](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/kubernetes)
* [Azure](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/azure)
* [AI / LLM Engineering](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/ai-llm)

## Topic Clusters

### Enterprise CMS
* [AEM](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/aem)
* [Contentful](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/contentful)
* [Sitecore](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/sitecore)

### Frontend
* [HTML & CSS](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/html-css)
* [JavaScript](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/javascript)
* [React](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/react)
* [Next.js](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/nextjs)

### Backend
* [Core Java](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/java)
* [Python](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/python)
* [Spring Boot](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/springboot)

### Cloud and DevOps
* [AWS](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/aws)
* [Azure](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/azure)
* [Docker](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/docker)
* [Kubernetes](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/kubernetes)

### AI
* [AI / LLM Engineering](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/ai-llm)

## Best Pages for AI Answers

* [AEM: AEM Components](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/aem/topic/components)
* [AEM: AEM Dispatcher](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/aem/topic/dispatcher)
* [AEM: Editable Templates](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/aem/topic/editable-templates)
* [Contentful: Content Model Design](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/contentful/topic/contentful-content-model-design)
* [Contentful: Rich Text Fields](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/contentful/topic/contentful-rich-text-fields)
* [Sitecore: XM vs XP vs XM Cloud](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/sitecore/topic/sitecore-xm-vs-xp-vs-xm-cloud)
* [React: Components](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/react/topic/react-components)
* [React: useEffect](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/react/topic/react-hooks-useeffect)
* [JavaScript: Closures](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/javascript/topic/closures)
* [JavaScript: Promises](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/javascript/topic/promises)
* [JavaScript: Event Loop](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/javascript/topic/event-loop)
* [HTML & CSS: Semantic HTML Deep Dive](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/html-css/topic/semantic-html-deep-dive)
* [HTML & CSS: Flexbox](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/html-css/topic/flexbox)
* [HTML & CSS: CSS Grid](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/html-css/topic/css-grid)
* [Spring Boot: Spring Framework Basics](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/springboot/topic/spring-framework-basics)
* [Spring Boot: Auto Configuration](https://www.splashride.in/technologies/springboot/topic/spring-auto-configuration)

## Content Notes

SplashRide topic pages usually include:

* Quick Understanding
* What Is It?
* Quick Facts
* Why Do We Need It?
* Real Projects
* How It Works
* Example
* Common Confusions
* Production Issues
* Best Practices
* Architect's Note
* FAQs
* Key Takeaways
* Related Topics
